question: Find the number of concerts happened in the stadium with the highest capacity .
gold_sql: select count(*) from concert where stadium_id = (select stadium_id from stadium order by capacity desc limit 1)
predicted_sql: SELECT count(*) FROM concert JOIN stadium ON concert.attr_1424ca_key = stadium.attr_1424ca_key WHERE stadium.attr_7bd14a = (SELECT max(attr_7bd14a) FROM stadium)
raw_response: SELECT count(*) FROM concert JOIN stadium ON concert.attr_1424ca_key = stadium.attr_1424ca_key WHERE stadium.attr_7bd14a = (SELECT max(attr_7bd14a) FROM stadium)
